name: chaos-ai-suite
description: My Chaos AI Suite - 自律型AI社員管理・実務自動化アプリケーション

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run build --workspace packages/backend && npm run build --workspace packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/frontend
